← The Foundations

The Foundations · Build to last

Funding

Map the funding that's realistic for your stage — and tell the real grants from the scams.

90 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • The funding realistic for your stage (grants, loans, lines of credit)
  • Telling real grants from scams
  • What lenders and grantors actually look for

What you'll walk out with

A map of funding options that fit your stage.

The Foundations open this fall (2026). Be first to hear — and grab a free hour in the meantime — at Coffee with Quinta.

Join the waitlist Start free: Coffee with Quinta
